creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 181110
svn diff for graphics/delaboratory

I find this useful. So I'm going to rescue it.

Changes
replaces MASTER_SITES, WWW, MAINTAINER (to me)
removes BROKEN, DEPRECATED, EXPIRATION_DATE
reflows pkg-descr (to prevent unwanted wrapping)

That's it!

Please find the svn diff (graphics_delaboratory.diff), attached to this pr.

Thanks!

--Chris
